Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices

Class Sensor

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.AbstractEntity

cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.Sensor
All Implemented Interfaces:
DeviceOperationsApi
public class Sensor
extends Device
This class represents sensor.
Version:
1.0
Author:

    • Sensor

      public Sensor​(java.lang.String name, Consumption consumption, DeviceState deviceState, java.lang.String descriptionOfAction)

      name - name of the device
      consumption - consumption of the device
      deviceState - state of device
